details.text: Go to the Collection section in RollerCoin, select all the miners you have, copy and paste them into the text area on the left panel. Click ADD to import your miners.
Your imported miners will appear in the MINERS tab on the right panel, ready to be placed.
You can also add racks from the RACKS tab using the ADD button to expand your room capacity.
Navigate between your rooms using the tabs at the top of the room grid.
Manage your active rooms and change the room background from the settings panel on the right.
The top panel displays your total power, active bonus, and real-time changes as you modify your room setup.
Active set bonuses from your placed miners and racks are shown in the left panel.
Select one or more miners and click CONTINUE to preview the changes. The system shows what will be added, removed (if rooms are full), and the power/bonus impact before confirming.
Auto mode finds the optimal distribution of miners and racks across all active rooms to maximize power. You can set a maximum power limit in Eh/s.
Manual mode gives you full control over placement. Click or drag miners and racks directly into specific room slots.
When active, items are placed instantly on click or by dragging them onto the room grid. Valid drop targets highlight in green.
With manual mode active, hover over a rack or miner to see the option to remove it. Removing a rack also removes all miners inside it.
Activate Simulation to test different configurations without losing your current setup. Save or discard changes when you're done.
